content:
Underground House of the Future reinvents Chinese cave home with 3D printing

University of Hong Kong professors John Lin, Olivier Ottevaere and Lidia Ratoi have worked with students to overhaul an underground house in northern China, suggesting a new future for these traditional dwellings. Underground House of the Future is a complete rebuild of a house in Zhangbian Township, a village in the Loess Plateau in Henan

The post Underground House of the Future reinvents Chinese cave home with 3D printing appeared first on Dezeen.

metadata.title: Underground House of the Future reinvents Chinese cave home with 3D printing
